mapper.sql: SELECT t.id, t.member_id, t.gym_id, t.trainer_id, t.ticket_type, t.status, t.issued_at, t.used_at, t.expires_at, t.month_year, up.name AS member_name, cu.name AS trainer_name FROM crm_feedback_tickets t LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = t.member_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = t.trainer_id
mapper.select: WHERE t.member_id = #{memberId} AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY t.issued_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_feedback_tickets (id, member_id, gym_id, trainer_id, ticket_type, status, issued_at, expires_at, month_year) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{trainerId}, #{ticketType}, #{status}, NOW(), #{expiresAt}, #{monthYear})
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_feedback_tickets SET status = #{status}, used_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'used' THEN NOW() ELSE used_at END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_feedback_tickets SET trainer_id = #{trainerId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_ticket_settings WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_feedback_tickets SET status = 'expired' WHERE status = 'issued' AND expires_at < NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_ticket_settings (id, gym_id, free_tickets_per_member, max_tickets_per_month, is_beta, updated_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{gymId}, #{freeTicketsPerMember}, #{maxTicketsPerMonth}, #{beta}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE free_tickets_per_member = #{freeTicketsPerMember}, max_tickets_per_month = #{maxTicketsPerMonth}, is_beta = #{beta}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW()
